output.root_cause: Transient Snowflake internal error (300005). Self-resolved on next run. No warehouse contention detected.

decision_log.rationale: QUERY_HISTORY shows the model succeeded on the next hourly run. Warehouse queue depth was normal at the time of failure. No blocking queries detected. This is a known Snowflake transient error that self-resolves.

tool_calls.input: SELECT QUERY_TYPE, TOTAL_ELAPSED_TIME/1000 as seconds, WAREHOUSE_NAME, QUERY_TEXT FROM SNOWFLAKE.ACCOUNT_USAGE.QUERY_HISTORY WHERE START_TIME >= DATEADD(hour, -2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) AND WAREHOUSE_NAME = 'TRANSFORM_M' ORDER BY TOTAL_ELAPSED_TIME DESC LIMIT 10
